title: The Cupboard
content:
I know a little cupboard,
    With a teeny tiny key,
    And there's a jar of Lollypops
         For me, me, me.

    It has a little shelf, my dear,
    As dark as dark can be,
    And there's a dish of Banbury Cakes
         For me, me, me.

    I have a small fat grandmamma,
    With a very slippery knee,
    And she's the Keeper of the Cupboard
         With the key, key, key.

    And I'm very good, my dear,
    As good as good can be,
    There's Branbury Cakes, and Lollypops
         For me, me, me.
meaning:
Walter De La Mare's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Cupboard"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
